Bulbasaur.strategy_guide: Bulbasaur is a Grass/Poison boss. Use a Fire-type (like Charizard) or Flying-type. No dodging is needed as the boss hits very lightly. Just spam fast attacks and use Max Attack when transformed.

Charmander.strategy_guide: Charmander is a pure Fire boss. Bring Squirtle/Blastoise. Use Water Gun and Hydro Cannon. Tank all hits; the battle is very easy and won't require dodging.

Squirtle.strategy_guide: Squirtle is a pure Water boss. Lead with Bulbasaur/Venusaur. Spam Vine Whip and Frenzy Plant. Dynamax quickly to deal massive Grass-type Overgrowth damage.

Wooloo.strategy_guide: Wooloo is a Normal-type boss. Bring a Fighting-type attacker like Falinks or Machamp. Spam Counter and Superpower. No dodging necessary.

Skwovet.strategy_guide: Skwovet is a Normal-type boss. Bring Machamp or Falinks. Counter fast attack charges the meter fast. Execute standard Max Knuckle attacks.

Beldum.strategy_guide: Beldum is a Steel/Psychic boss. It has high Defense. Bring Charizard (Fire Spin / Blast Burn) or Gengar (Shadow Claw / Shadow Ball). Dodging its targeted Iron Head attacks reduces damage and speeds up your Max Phase.

Falinks.strategy_guide: Falinks is a pure Fighting boss. Bring Charizard or Gengar. Flying or Psychic moves are super effective. Dodge when targeted to avoid taking large chunks of damage.

Gastly.strategy_guide: Gastly is a Ghost/Poison boss. Bring Gengar (Ghost-type mirror) or Metagross with Psychic-type moves. Use high-DPS attacks and dodge its targeted attacks to stay healthy.

Drilbur.strategy_guide: Drilbur is a Ground boss. Bring Venusaur or Blastoise. Avoid Ground-type attacks by dodging. Use water or grass Max Attacks.

Venusaur (Gigantamax).strategy_guide: Gigantamax Venusaur is extremely tanky. Lead with Gigantamax Charizard or standard Charizard. Dodging its targeted Solar Beam attacks is mandatory to avoid wiping out. Swap to a secondary tank like Dubwool if your main Charizard gets low. Collect all Max Energy bubbles to enter G-Max Wildfire phase quickly.

Charizard (Gigantamax).strategy_guide: Gigantamax Charizard deals massive Fire-type damage. Lead with Gigantamax Blastoise or standard Blastoise. Dodge its targeted Blast Burn/Overheat attacks (three white lines) at all costs. Swiping to dodge also spawns Max Energy bubbles which speed up the G-Max Cannonade phase. Use Max Spirit if your health drops below 30%.

Blastoise (Gigantamax).strategy_guide: Gigantamax Blastoise has huge Defense. Lead with Gigantamax Venusaur or standard Venusaur. Spam Vine Whip to generate energy fast. When targeted, swipe left/right to dodge Hydro Pump damage. Once transformed, execute G-Max Vine Lash to inflict heavy damage.

Gengar (Gigantamax).strategy_guide: Gigantamax Gengar hits incredibly hard. Lead with Metagross (Zen Headbutt / Meteor Mash) or Gengar. Dodge its Shadow Ball targeted attacks. Metagross is a great anchor due to its resistances. Use G-Max Terror or Max Steelspike.

Toxtricity (Gigantamax).strategy_guide: Gigantamax Toxtricity is an Electric/Poison boss. Lead with Excadrill (Mud-Slap / Earthquake) or Metagross. Ground attacks deal 2.56x damage. Dodge its targeted Wild Charge attacks. Excadrill will easily demolish this boss with Max Quake.
